steps.description: The student removes the battery from the GoPro.
The student inserts the battery into the GoPro.
The student removes the micro SD card from the GoPro.
The student inserts an SD card.
The student turns on their GoPro.
The student turns off their GoPro.
The student assembles the GoPro into the mount.
The student removes the GoPro from the mount.
The students assemble the GoPro into the handheld grip.
The student removes the GoPro from the handheld grip.
